title: The Boy Who Cried Wolf
content:
There once was a boy who watched sheep.

Every day he sat on the hill with the sheep. It was boring.

One day he thought of a way to have fun. He shouted, "Wolf! Wolf!"

The villagers ran up the hill to help. But there was no wolf.

The boy laughed and laughed.

The next day, he did it again. "Wolf! Wolf!" he cried.

The villagers came running again. But there was no wolf.

"Don't cry wolf when there is no wolf!" they said.

Then one day, a real wolf came!

"Wolf! Wolf!" the boy cried.

But nobody came. They thought he was lying again.

The wolf chased away all the sheep.

The boy learned a hard lesson that day.

Nobody believes a liar, even when they tell the truth.

The End.

author: Aesop
